description: Step out in style, dressed up to the nines, with this natty pair of formal shoes from homme for men. Goes perfectly with everyday office ensembles, and will also look great when styled with semi-formals. Grab this pair before stocks run out.UpperSlip-on styling with a leather upperWingtip styling at the toe box and a monk strap across the midfootReinforced overlay at the heel cupPadded footbedOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and textured patterning for gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a leather brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
